Our Story

Cooking with
Passion & Soul

Harika Royal Restaurant has earned the love of thousands of food lovers across Vijayawada. Located in Singh Nagar, we proudly serve both vegetarian and non-vegetarian dishes — from rich Mughlai gravies and Punjabi classics to spicy Andhra-style seafood and flavour-packed Biryanis.

Our chefs bring together the best of North Indian, South Indian, and Chinese cuisines under one roof. Every dish is made fresh, every day — because our guests deserve nothing less than the best.

North Indian, South Indian, Chinese & Mughlai cuisine under one roof
Open 7 days a week — 11:00 AM to 11:00 PM, no holidays
Family-friendly casual dining with comfortable A/C seating
Rated 4.0★ with 1300+ reviews on Justdial

Reviews

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★

"The Chettinad curry was the best I've had outside Chennai. Rich, complex, and absolutely authentic. We'll be back every visit."

Arjun Reddy · Hyderabad
★★★★★

"Took a client here for dinner — they were blown away. The ambience, the service, the food — every detail was perfect. Highly recommend."

Priya Sharma · Bangalore
★★★★★

"Biryani that actually tastes like home. The dum cooking really makes a difference — you can taste the patience in every bite."
